basic_details.job_title: India Optel Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Engineer, Assistant Project Manager and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: India Optel has published the Project Engineer (Optical System Designer) Notification 2026 on 22nd April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 6 vacancies for various positions including Project Engineer, Assistant Project Manager (Marketing), and Assistant Project Engineer (Technical). Candidates within the age range of 18 to 40 years and holding a Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Physics, MBA/PG Diploma in Management, or B.E./B.Tech are eligible to apply through offline mode from 22nd April 2026 to 15th May 2026. Find all details about the India Optel Project Engineer new vacancy 2026, in

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age for Project Engineer [Optical System Designer]: 40 years Maximum Age for Assistant Project Manager [Marketing] & Assistant Project Engineer [Technical]: 30 years Age relaxation will be provided as per GOI orders on Reservation & Concessions for SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/PwBD/EWS/Ex-Servicemen.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors Degree in Engineering/Physics, MBA/PG Diploma in Management, B.E./B.Tech
qualification.details: Project Engineer (Optical System Designer): First class (60% marks) full time regular Bachelors Degree in Engineering/Physics from recognized University. Preferred: PG in relevant field. Branches: Optical Engineering, Laser & Electro Optical Engg, Optics & Optoelectronics, Photonics. Min 6 years exp in Optical System Designing with min 2 years on Zemax. Skills: Ansys Zemax, CODE-V etc. Assistant Project Manager (Marketing): First class (60% marks) full time regular MBA/PG Diploma in Management with Marketing as major. Assistant Project Engineer (Technical): First class (60% marks) full time regular B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical/Electronics/Mechatronics.

salary_details.details: Project Engineer (Optical System Designer): Rs. 60000-180000 Per Month Assistant Project Manager (Marketing): Rs. 40000-140000 Per Month Assistant Project Engineer (Technical): Rs. 40000-140000 Per Month

selection_process: Screening of applications Shortlisting Document Verification Interview Final Merit
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for India Optel Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ddpdoo.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for India Optel Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for India Optel Recruitment 2026 is 15 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Engineer (Optical System Designer) posts?
faq.answer: There are 2 vacancies available for the Project Engineer (Optical System Designer) post in the India Optel Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 40 years for all the posts. Age relaxation is applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Engineer (Optical System Designer) post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Project Engineer (Optical System Designer) post ranges from Rs. 60,000 to Rs. 1,80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for the Assistant Project Manager (Marketing) post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Project Manager (Marketing) post, candidates need a first-class MBA/PG Diploma in Management with Marketing as a major.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the India Optel Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes screening of applications, shortlisting, document verification, interview, and final merit.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of India Optel, which is https://ddpdoo.gov.in.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual.
